title: Corporate Sales Manager for Wellness Program
description:
Job Title

Corporate Sales Executive / Manager (Wellness Program)

Job Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute corporate sales strategies to promote wellness services, packages, and programs to corporate clients, HR departments, and organizations

  • Identify, prospect, and build long-term relationships with corporate clients, including SMEs, MNCs, government bodies, and institutions

  • Present and pitch customized corporate wellness solutions such as employee wellness programs, spa packages, workshops, and health initiatives

  • Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation, proposal preparation, negotiation, closing, and post-sales account management

  • Achieve assigned sales targets, revenue goals, and key performance indicators (KPIs)

  • Collaborate with operations, marketing, and wellness teams to ensure smooth delivery and high client satisfaction

  • Prepare quotations, contracts, and corporate agreements in accordance with company policies

  • Conduct market research to identify industry trends, competitors, and new business opportunities in the wellness sector

  • Attend networking events, exhibitions, and corporate meetings to expand the company’s corporate client base

  • Maintain accurate sales records, pipelines, and reports using CRM systems

  • Handle client feedback, renewals, upselling, and cross-selling opportunities

Job Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Business, Marketing, Sales, Hospitality, Wellness Management, or a related field

  • Minimum 2–5 years of corporate/B2B sales experience, preferably in wellness, healthcare, hospitality, beauty, fitness, or lifestyle industries

  • Proven track record in achieving or exceeding sales targets

  • Strong presentation, negotiation, and interpersonal skills

  • Ability to understand client needs and propose tailored wellness solutions

  • Self-motivated, results-driven, and able to work independently as well as in a team

  • Excellent communication skills in English; additional languages are an advantage

  • Proficient in MS Office and CRM systems

  • Willingness to travel locally for client meetings and corporate engagements

  • Experience working with HR departments, corporate benefits, or employee wellness programs is a strong advantage

postedCompany.description:
Kenko Holdings Pte Ltd is the parent company of Singapore’s premier wellness brand, Kenko Wellness Spa & Reflexology. With its name rooted in the Japanese word for “health” (健康), Kenko has cultivated over three decades of experience in delivering foot reflexology, body massage, and spa treatments from its founding in 1991. Operating multiple outlets in prime locations across Singapore, the company prides itself on a complete wellness journey – combining expert massage techniques, tranquil ambience, and a customer-centric experience.

As a group, Kenko Holdings oversees both the service-delivery arm and its training academy, establishing a synergistic ecosystem that spans spa operations and professional wellness education. With the wellness industry gaining momentum and consumer tastes evolving, Kenko is well-positioned for growth through service innovation (such as face/head/neck massage), expanded outlet coverage, and enhanced training and certification initiatives. By leveraging its trusted brand, strong operational foundation and commitment to wellness excellence, Kenko Holdings provides a compelling value proposition for both customers and strategic stakeholders.
postedCompany.name: KENKO HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
